metadata.name: passpay
metadata.description: PassPay - Mobile event ticketing and payments on Solana

accounts.name: collection_mint
docs: Collection mint PDA created during create_event

accounts.name: user_attendance_record
docs: User attendance record (may not exist for new users)

accounts.name: holder_token_account
docs: The token account proving current ownership

accounts.name: ticket_holder
docs: The person physically present, verified by token ownership above

accounts.name: badge_mint
docs: The badge mint for the tier being issued (caller must pass correct one)

accounts.name: user_badge_token_account
docs: User's token account for the badge

accounts.name: badge_authority
docs: PDA authority for minting badges

accounts.name: user_attendance_record
docs: User attendance record (may not exist for new users)

accounts.name: bronze_badge_mint
docs: Badge mints for each tier (must be created before calling this instruction)

accounts.name: badge_mint
docs: The badge mint for the tier being issued (if applicable)

accounts.name: user_badge_token_account
docs: User's token account for the badge (created if needed)

accounts.name: badge_authority
docs: PDA authority for minting badges

accounts.name: user_attendance_record
docs: User attendance record (may not exist for new users)

accounts.name: holder
docs: The current ticket holder requesting the refund.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Anyone can call this to update price (but rate-limited)

errors.name: NotSuperAdmin
errors.msg: Only the super admin can perform this action

errors.name: AdminNameTooLong
errors.msg: Admin name exceeds 64 characters

errors.name: AdminNotActive
errors.msg: Admin is not active

errors.name: EventNameTooLong
errors.msg: Event name exceeds 64 characters

errors.name: VenueTooLong
errors.msg: Venue name exceeds 128 characters

errors.name: EventDateInPast
errors.msg: Event date must be in the future

errors.name: InvalidSeatCount
errors.msg: Total seats must be at least 1

errors.name: InvalidTicketPrice
errors.msg: Ticket price must be greater than zero

errors.name: EventNotActive
errors.msg: Event is not active for ticket sales

errors.name: SoldOut
errors.msg: All tickets have been sold

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: You are not authorized to perform this action

errors.name: AlreadyCheckedIn
errors.msg: This ticket has already been checked in

errors.name: NotTicketHolder
errors.msg: Token account does not hold a valid ticket

errors.name: TicketEventMismatch
errors.msg: Ticket does not belong to this event

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Invalid ticket mint

errors.name: MerchantEventMismatch
errors.msg: Merchant is not associated with this event

errors.name: MerchantNotActive
errors.msg: Merchant is not active

errors.name: InvalidMerchantWallet
errors.msg: Invalid merchant wallet

errors.name: InvalidPaymentAmount
errors.msg: Payment amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InsufficientTreasuryBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient treasury balance

errors.name: MerchantNameTooLong
errors.msg: Merchant name exceeds 64 characters

errors.name: MetadataUriTooLong
errors.msg: Metadata URI exceeds 200 characters

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: SeatsBelowSold
errors.msg: Cannot reduce total seats below tickets already sold

errors.name: TicketAlreadyCheckedIn
errors.msg: Ticket has already been checked in and cannot be refunded

errors.name: EarlyAccessNotStarted
errors.msg: Early access period is not yet active

errors.name: EarlyAccessOnly
errors.msg: This event is in early access period - only Silver+ members can purchase

errors.name: BadgeNameTooLong
errors.msg: Badge collection name exceeds maximum length

errors.name: BadgeSymbolTooLong
errors.msg: Badge collection symbol exceeds maximum length

errors.name: BadgeUriTooLong
errors.msg: Badge collection URI exceeds maximum length

errors.name: DynamicPricingDisabled
errors.msg: Dynamic pricing is not enabled for this event

errors.name: PriceUpdateTooSoon
errors.msg: Price update requested too soon - wait for interval to pass

errors.name: InvalidPricingParams
errors.msg: Invalid pricing parameters - ensure min < max and factors are within range

errors.name: PriceExceedsMaximum
errors.msg: Calculated price exceeds maximum allowed price

errors.name: PriceBelowMinimum
errors.msg: Calculated price is below minimum allowed price

types.name: BadgeCollection
docs: Main badge collection that manages all proof-of-presence badges

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority that can issue badges (program PDA)

fields.name: total_issued
docs: Total badges issued across all types

fields.name: bronze_badge_mint
docs: Mint addresses for each badge tier

fields.name: collection_name
docs: Collection metadata

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

types.name: BadgeTier
docs: Badge tier enumeration for proof of presence system

types.name: UserAttendanceRecord
docs: Individual user's attendance tracking account

fields.name: user
docs: User's wallet address

fields.name: total_events
docs: Total number of events attended

fields.name: current_tier
docs: Current highest tier achieved

fields.name: lifetime_spend
docs: Total amount spent across all events

fields.name: current_streak
docs: Streak tracking

fields.name: created_at
docs: Account creation timestamp

fields.name: last_updated
docs: Last updated timestamp

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed
